chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-471 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 22-10-2025 None present for the petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. **** None present for the petitioners, nor any intimation is received; the position remains the same as on the two preceding dates of hearing. Through the instant petition, the petitioners have prayed that this Court may direct the respondents to issue appointment orders in their favour pursuant to the advertisement published in newspapers for the posts of PST and JST in the year 2012. Learned Additional Advocate General has raised an objection regarding the maintainability of the petition on the ground of laches. We are not inclined to examine the allegations raised by the petitioners as contained in the instant petition, which suffers from unexplained laches. Moreover, the petitioners have failed to pursue the matter with due diligence, as the same has remained pending since 2023 without any meaningful progress. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in proceeding with the matter. Accordingly, the instant petition, being hit by laches is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
